key.name: enabled-on-single-monitor-only
key.summary: Only run Harbor on single-monitor setups
key.description: If true, Harbor disables its custom workspace behavior when an external monitor is connected.

key.name: hide-top-bar-on-secondary-workspaces
key.summary: Hide the top bar on secondary workspaces
key.description: If true, Harbor hides the GNOME top bar outside the home workspace.

key.name: hide-dock-on-secondary-workspaces
key.summary: Hide the dock on secondary workspaces
key.description: If true, Harbor hides Ubuntu Dock outside the home workspace.

key.name: disable-blur-my-shell-panel-blur-on-secondary-workspaces
key.summary: Disable Blur My Shell panel blur on secondary workspaces
key.description: If true, Harbor turns off Blur My Shell panel blur outside the home workspace when that extension is installed.

key.name: redirect-empty-secondary-workspaces
key.description: If true, Harbor prevents staying on empty secondary workspaces by redirecting to the nearest valid previous workspace.

key.name: return-home-on-close-from-secondary
key.summary: Return to the home workspace after closing from a secondary workspace
key.description: If true, Harbor returns to workspace 1 when a managed secondary workspace becomes empty after a close action.

key.name: animate-chrome-transitions
key.summary: Animate top bar and dock transitions
key.description: If true, Harbor fades shell chrome in and out instead of switching visibility instantly.

key.name: chrome-fade-duration-ms
key.description: Controls how long Harbor's top bar and dock fade transitions take.

key.name: excluded-gtk-application-ids
key.description: Applications with these GTK application IDs are treated as workspace-agnostic utility windows.

key.name: excluded-wm-classes
key.description: Windows with these WM classes are treated as workspace-agnostic utility windows.
